description_long: This storage tank structure features a rectangular brick base with a flat, reinforced concrete roof, surrounded by a metal safety railing. The roof has a large circular tank or hatch at its center, likely for storage or access, and a tall cylindrical metal vent or exhaust stack with a protective cage. Three small rectangular windows are visible on one side, and a single metal door provides entry to the building. The exterior is primarily composed of light-colored brickwork and smooth, industrial-grade metal components. The overall design suggests a utilitarian, industrial function, suitable for storing liquids or gases in an urban or light industrial setting.
description: A rectangular brick storage building with a flat, railed roof, central circular tank hatch, and a tall metal vent stack. Features include windows, a metal door, and industrial construction details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the brick facade with three windows, a metal door, and the roof with a large circular hatch and vent stack.
description_view_1: Rear view highlights the plain brick wall, the full height of the vent stack, and the circular hatch on the roof.
description_view_2: Side view displays the vent stack in the foreground, the roof railing, and partial windows on the brick wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the plain brick wall, the circular hatch, and the vent stack positioned to the left.
attribute_architectural_style: rectangular with flat roof and cylindrical vent
